Watch face contact sheet

All fixtures · Apple Watch Ultra 3 49mm sim (422×514) · 2026-05-26
Canonical-gap-always + flex-glyph + top=bottom symmetry rule active · width-cap binds by widest row
Canonical NumberFace Converted this session Takeover exception Flagged for review

The locked law

  1. Small top label rides the OS clock baseline. WARMUP / REST / REP n/m share a baseline with the system clock at top-right.
  2. Top margin = bottom margin. Strict pixel symmetry — except when a strip or button reservation replaces the bottom.
  3. Small labels stay at LABEL_FONT. Never resize.
  4. Canonical inter-line gap, ALWAYS. Every consecutive pair of lines at the same gap value. No derived-gap math.
  5. Big rows FLEX vertically to fill. Numbers grow as row count drops — REST (3 rows + 1 label) gets bigger digits than WARMUP (3 rows + 2 labels).
  6. Width cap by widest row. Multi-row faces auto-shrink so the longest text (e.g. h:mm:ss elapsed) clears the screen.
  7. Anchored faces get full-width. With a top label, big rows sit BELOW the clock zone and use the full screen minus bezel margins.
Calibrated on Ultra 3. Rules live in NumberFace.body at legacy/native/Faff/FaffWatch Watch App/FaceKit.swift. Full text: feedback_watch_face_layout_rules.md.
